comment.body: My speculation is this sudden mention of uranium enrichment is simply to silence certain neighboring countries' objections. Qatar, KSA and Oman don't want regime change in Iran, but are wary of Iran's nuclear threat; their sweet spot is a weakened and isolated Islamic Republic regime. Now if Iran disagrees, then the Gulfies have nothing to say about military actions from the US and Israel.
comment.raw_body: My speculation is this sudden mention of uranium enrichment is simply to silence certain neighboring countries' objections. Qatar, KSA and Oman don't want regime change in Iran, but are wary of Iran's nuclear threat; their sweet spot is a weakened and isolated Islamic Republic regime. Now if Iran disagrees, then the Gulfies have nothing to say about military actions from the US and Israel.

comment.body:
@Alma my technique is all based on Alma teachings. I work a lot so I only take trades that setup in AM or PM. To me it’s simple. 

1. 4hr into weekly pivot over extended is key and floating under previous sell structure. Alma says structure is important. Or visa versa. 
2. Enter on retest and hold (for up move), or reclaim above big pivot/structure that can’t hold then enter short  w stop above big structure / pivot 
3. Trim into breakdowns or breakouts of the floating / overextenddstructure and set stops at break even then take the next 1-2 days off. 
4. Thank Alma 

This is what she teaches.. I think :)
comment.raw_body:
${1} my technique is all based on Alma teachings. I work a lot so I only take trades that setup in AM or PM. To me it’s simple. 

1. 4hr into weekly pivot over extended is key and floating under previous sell structure. Alma says structure is important. Or visa versa. 
2. Enter on retest and hold (for up move), or reclaim above big pivot/structure that can’t hold then enter short  w stop above big structure / pivot 
3. Trim into breakdowns or breakouts of the floating / overextenddstructure and set stops at break even then take the next 1-2 days off. 
4. Thank Alma 

This is what she teaches.. I think :)
